overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes under elevated highways while surrounded by holographic advertisements, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians. The environment transitions from covered urban corridors to open streets lined with palm trees and distinctive sci-fi architecture.

events.description: begins walking forward from crosswalk onto sidewalk under the elevated highway
moving deeper under the elevated highway structure into shadowed area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing digital billboards and storefronts with neon signage

large digital screen displaying animated geisha and sushi advertisements

yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on the pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive red elevated highway structure. The player walks past vibrant neon signs including a distinctive pink sushi sign and large digital billboards displaying animated advertisements. The environment is urban and cyberpunk-themed with a dark red building facade on the left and futuristic vehicles passing by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk under elevated highway

events.description: waiting at red traffic light then crossing the street with group of pedestrians
turning right to continue along the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating through pedestrians and observing futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street alongside the ego character

entered.detail: red rectangular sign with 'Diamond' text hanging from the highway structure
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered sidewalk into a wide intersection, crossing the street at a crosswalk marked with white stripes. A red 'Diamond' sign hangs from the elevated highway above while traffic lights control the flow of futuristic vehicles. The lighting shifts to natural sunlight as the player crosses with a group of pedestrians, then turns right to continue along the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with curved teal architecture transitioning to open street

events.description: entering covered walkway with distinctive teal curved architectural elements
exiting covered area into brighter sunlight with palm trees and open sky visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the futuristic covered walkway and emerging into a sunlit area with distinctive architecture

entered.detail: futuristic covered walkway with curved teal and white structural elements overhead
modern building with curved glass facade and teal coloring
large floating holographic billboard displaying rotating advertisements
tall cylindrical tower with horizontal black and white stripes in the distance
blue commercial building with 'All Foods' signage and pink entrance

segments.scene_description: The player enters a distinctive covered walkway featuring curved teal and white architectural elements. The environment transitions from the red highway structure to a more modern area with a curved glass building and a blue 'All Foods' commercial building. As the player emerges from the covered section, a tall cylindrical striped tower becomes visible in the distance along with palm trees, indicating a shift to a more open, tropical urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street lined with palm trees and futuristic towers

events.description: entering open street with palm trees and clear view of the cylindrical tower and glass dome structures
slight turn to navigate around pedestrians while continuing toward the tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm-lined street toward the distinctive cylindrical tower, observing the futuristic cityscape and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing and carrying bags

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the street providing tropical atmosphere
large building with transparent green glass dome facade and curved architecture
building facade with purple neon lighting and large digital advertising screens
tall futuristic street lamp with curved design and multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide, sunlit commercial street lined with palm trees on the right. The cylindrical tower dominates the center view, growing larger as the player approaches. To the left stands a distinctive building with a transparent green glass dome structure, while the right side features buildings with vibrant purple neon lighting. The environment feels open and airy compared to the earlier covered sections, with clear blue skies visible above the futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban corridor into a wide, sun-drenched tropical cityscape. It begins on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive red elevated highway, passing vibrant pink sushi signs and digital billboards amidst a dark red architectural backdrop. As the camera exits the cover, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the lighting shifts to natural sunlight while crossing a striped crosswalk beneath a red Diamond sign. The movement then transitions through a modern teal and white curved walkway, moving away from the red highway structures toward a blue commercial building. Finally, the environment expands into an airy commercial street lined with palm trees and purple neon accents, with the view dominated by a towering cylindrical striped tower and a transparent green glass dome under a clear blue sky.
